assertions: Renders explicit per-criterion verdicts (pass/fail or equivalent) rather than one general impression
Cites evidence from the audited skill's actual files (quotes or file references) for its verdicts
Distinguishes aspects that cannot be measured today from aspects that failed
Prioritizes findings by cost/impact rather than listing them flat
prompt: give skills/apache-age an honest audit — is it actually well built? I want specifics cited from the files, not vibes. don't change any files, just tell me where it stands and what would matter most to fix.
